creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
ghostscript-5.10 has been released under GNU license, the idea is that
the GNU version should lag behind something like a year. It is 
convenient to carry the latest GNU ghostscript in the ports tree.
(This port updates ANY previous version I have distributed among 
committers)

How-To-Repeat: I suggest this new port replaces ghostscript and ghostscript4. It has 
several enhancements based on Andreas' port, the hpdj driver, and also
installs some filters. It also depends on the gsfonts port.
